Appearances:
Plaintiff Essex Management Corporation is present. Represented by Daniel Reyes.
Attorney Elizabeth Hurwitz is present for the plaintiff.
Defendants Sarah Deharo and Yeugeniy Grinberg are present.
Attorney Richard Roisman appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Adrian Colley, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.502B , for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of Oct-05-2015 remains on calendar.
